records.title: Stanford CS336 Spring 2026 alignment SFT/RLHF/RLVR refresh
records.trigger_condition: Directly ingest usable current Lecture 16 and Lecture 17 materials if the official course page exposes them, or recheck when the official CS336 row changes again.
records.allowed_action_now: Use current 2026 Lecture 15 and Lecture 16 as the live direct-read SFT/RLHF/DPO/RLVR anchor set; keep Lecture 17 blocked until the official current course page visibly exposes a public material link; do not claim watched-video understanding from recording pointers or hidden/guessed artifacts.
records.last_check_result: partially_open: official CS336 course schedule visibly exposes `lecture_16.pdf` for Lecture 16, while Lecture 17 still has no visible public material link; the only Lecture 17 candidate in page source is commented out and does not satisfy the visible-link rule.

records.title: Stanford CS25 May 21 Victoria Lin / Thinking Machines slot
records.trigger_condition: Official CS25 page or recordings page publishes materials or a public recording after the May 21, 2026 slot, or materially expands the official row beyond the current title-and-abstract listing.
records.allowed_action_now: Keep rechecking the official page after the lecture window; do not create a source note from title or abstract visibility alone.
records.last_check_result: still_future_pending: official CS25 page still lists May 21 as 'From Language Models to Native Multimodal Intelligence' for Victoria Lin (Thinking Machines) with a public abstract, but there are still no public materials on the row and the recordings page does not expose this slot as a selected public recording.
records.next_check_after: 2026-05-21 or after official CS25 page/recordings page changes

records.title: Stanford CS25 May 28 production inference recording/materials check
records.trigger_condition: Official CS25 recordings page exposes a selected public recording or additional public materials after the May 28, 2026 slot and recording delay.
records.allowed_action_now: Keep existing schedule-plus-primary-source note; recheck after lecture and expected recording delay; no video-level claim yet.
records.last_check_result: still_future_pending_recording: official CS25 schedule still lists May 28 Serving Transformers: Lessons from the Trenches of Production Inference, speaker Charles Frye (Modal), with public description but no selected public recording on the recordings page.
records.next_check_after: 2026-05-28 plus expected one-to-two-week recording delay, or after official CS25 page/recordings page changes

records.title: Direct full-watch passes for selected public Stanford recordings
records.trigger_condition: A concrete design question requires video-specific nuance not already captured from official notes, public slides, primary papers, and official docs.
records.allowed_action_now: Watch public official video directly in full; create compact original video note without timestamp dump, transcript storage, or comment-derived substitution.
records.target_note: Existing CS25/CS336/CS224N lecture notes, only when video pass materially changes Agent Studio implications.

records.title: Deferred local books only when they fill an Agent Studio gap
records.trigger_condition: A concrete Agent Studio architecture, glossary, onboarding, or prerequisite gap is identified that is not already covered by canon-ready books, docs, or Stanford sources.
records.allowed_action_now: Do not ingest broadly; promote only the smallest relevant slice with compact original synthesis and rights/provenance status preserved.
records.target_note: TBD by gap; use local book manifest safe notes strategy.

records.title: Recurring vault map, manifest, and safety audit
records.trigger_condition: After any new source note, chapter note, manifest update, source-map regeneration, local folder change, or official-source refresh.
records.allowed_action_now: Run JSON parse, source-map path, wiki-link, raw-payload, local folder extension, and excluded-source checks; update counts in audits/status.
